market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents
articles.description: Buzz is a group chat platform for the workplace that puts humans and their AI agents in the same conversation.

articles.title: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
articles.description: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotify, Netflix, YouTube, and TikTok to become

articles.title: Bucking EV slowdown, Sila raises $300M to expand battery materials factory
articles.description: Sila's fresh $300 million round will help it make enough of its silicon-carbon anode material to power more than 100,000 EVs.

articles.title: Pakistan steps up crypto enforcement with dedicated federal unit
articles.description: A senior official with Pakistan’s Federal Investigation Agency reportedly recommended other agencies establish similar units to address crypto-related crime.

articles.title: Pavel Durov says Telegram to roll out native Gram crypto wallet
articles.description: Telegram founder Pavel Durov said the messaging platform will roll out a native non-custodial Gram wallet this summer, bringing self-custody crypto transactions to its more than 1 billion users.

articles.title: Apple teams up with Klarna to launch a lease-to-own program for iPhones, iPads, and Macs
articles.description: The new leasing program is a big change for the hardware company, and comes as it looks to raise prices on many of its products.

articles.title: White House pushes Senate Democrats to take 'historic' crypto Clarity Act ethics deal
articles.description: Without revealing any details about the actual agreement from President Trump on potential presidential restrictions, his White House is urging its acceptance.

articles.title: Tesla spins up robotaxi pilots in Orlando and Tampa ahead of Q2 earnings
articles.description: The company didn't say how many are in each city and has taken a far more cautious approach to scaling the network than CEO Elon Musk had promised.

articles.title: Movement Labs files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy months after token scandal
articles.description: The filing comes after months of upheaval that included a controversial market-making agreement, an internal investigation into its MOVE token launch and a Binance ban tied to its market maker.

articles.title: Crypto market breakout could accelerate as AI trade cools, analyst says
articles.description: Bitcoin topped $67,000 while crypto stocks rallied on optimism over US crypto legislation and signs investors may be rotating out of AI trades.

articles.title: White House agrees to ethics provisions in market structure bill
articles.description: The price of Bitcoin moved above $66,000 to reach a seven-week high on Tuesday as reports circulated of a deal with the White House to address ethics in the CLARITY Act.

articles.title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
articles.description: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.

articles.title: Claude's Fable 5 just solved an 87-year-old math problem, and it matters for bitcoin
articles.description: Claude Fabel 5 disproved the Jacobian conjecture over the weekend, landing days after the capabilities of China's Kimi AI became the biggest force moving bitcoin markets.

articles.title: Galaxy sets up $5 million fund to help shield Bitcoin against quantum computing threats
articles.description: The crypto financial services firm is funding developers to strengthen the blockchain's security before quantum computers become powerful enough to steal billions in crypto.

articles.title: BIS warns stablecoins could weaken capital controls in emerging markets
articles.description: Researchers found dollar-backed stablecoins are less affected by capital controls than traditional bank deposits, raising new questions about monetary sovereignty in emerging markets.

articles.title: Threads rolls out parental supervision tools
articles.description: With the new tools, parents and guardians will be able to view their teen's time spent on Threads, set daily time limits, adjust sleep mode, and manage their privacy settings.

articles.title: MEXC adds Bittensor TAO staking for its global user base
articles.description: The integration with validator Yuma gives millions of MEXC users access to Bittensor, an AI-focused blockchain whose ecosystem now spans 128 specialized subnets.

articles.title: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
articles.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. could sanction Chinese open AI models over alleged IP theft, expanding the Trump administration's campaign to slow China's AI advances.

articles.title: Russia’s parliament passes crypto market law with $3,800 annual cap for retail investors
articles.description: While citizens still cannot use Bitcoin to buy groceries, the Kremlin is officially letting companies use digital tokens to bypass sanctions and other global trade hurdles.

articles.title: Bitcoin nears seven-week high as stocks ignore Iran strikes, Trump 10% tariff plans
articles.description: Bitcoin and crypto joined US stocks in brushing off US-Iran war escalation and the threat of fresh trade tariffs before the end of the month.
